title: Relational DB
content:
# NodeJS-ExpressJS Revision

*   **libuv event loop:** Timers $\to$ Pending $\to$ Poll $\to$ Check $\to$ Close. CPU-heavy tasks run in C++ thread pool.
*   **Error Middleware Arity:** Must have 4 arguments `(err, req, res, next)`. Checked by Express via reflection.
*   **Connection Pool:** Caches active database connections to avoid TCP handshakes on queries.


*   **Relational DB Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
